uniqueUsers.description: Number of unique users who performed at least one activity in the application.

uniqueRecurringUsers.description: Number of unique users who have been active for more than one day over the past 30 days.

uniqueOrganizations.description: Number of unique company accounts that have installed the application.

installations.description: Number of application installations for a team.

uninstallations.description: Number of application uninstallations for a team.
